def positive_python_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_multi_error_list_allocated_before_failure():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_multi_error_list_allocated_before_failure"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag error accumulation lists allocated on success-heavy paths before any error occurs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
